subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the names and ordained for them whatsoever He willeth. He, verily, is the One Who hath power over whatsoever He desireth through His word "Be," and it is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من انزل الاسمآء و قدر لها ما اراد انه لهو المقتدر علی ما یشآء بقوله کن فیکون
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
